prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document specifically discusses energy use, fuel types, and renewable energy practices among farm businesses in England, as evidenced by the frequent references to English farms, the Farm Business Survey conducted in England, and statistical data that pertains only to the English farming context.
